name: Microsoft OneDrive
description: Microsoft OneDrive (personal + business) and SharePoint document libraries via Microsoft Graph. Browse drives and folders, read/upload/download files, search, and manage sharing.

tools.name: get_my_drive
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's default OneDrive — driveId, quota (used / total / remaining), drive type.

tools.name: list_drives
tools.description: List all drives accessible to the authenticated user (personal OneDrive + every SharePoint document library they can see).

tools.name: list_root_children
tools.description: List items at the root of the user's OneDrive.

tools.name: list_folder_children
tools.description: List items inside a folder by item ID. Use list_root_children for the drive root, get_item_by_path for a known path, or this for a folder you already have an ID for.

item_id.description: Drive item ID of the folder.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Get drive item metadata by ID — name, size, mime type, parent reference, web URL, created/modified times.

tools.name: get_item_by_path
tools.description: Get a drive item by its path relative to the drive root (e.g. 'Documents/report.docx'). Avoids the list-then-find dance.

path.description: Path relative to drive root, no leading slash.

tools.name: download_item
tools.description: Download the binary content of a drive item. Returns the file bytes (or a redirect to a short-lived download URL).

tools.name: upload_small_file
tools.description: Upload (or replace) a small file (≤4 MB) at a given path. The request body should be the raw file bytes; the endpoint replaces or creates the item at the supplied path. For larger files use the Graph upload-session flow externally.

path.description: Target path under the drive root (e.g. 'Documents/notes.txt').

content.description: File contents. Raw bytes or base64 depending on executor handling. Max 4 MB.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder. Default conflict behavior is 'rename' (Graph appends ' 1', ' 2', etc).

parent_id.description: Parent folder item ID. Use 'root' for the drive root.

folder.description: Empty object marker required by Graph: pass {}.

tools.name: delete_item
tools.description: Delete a drive item (file or folder). Items go to the user's recycle bin and can be restored from the OneDrive UI for 30 days (consumer) / 93 days (business).

tools.name: move_or_rename_item
tools.description: Move and/or rename a drive item by patching its parentReference and/or name. Pass either name (rename), parentReference.id (move), or both.

parentReference.description: { id: '<new_parent_id>' } to move into a different folder.

tools.name: copy_item
tools.description: Asynchronously copy an item to another folder. Returns 202 Accepted with a Location header for polling progress.

name.description: Optional new name for the copy.

parentReference.description: { driveId, id } of the destination folder.

tools.name: search_drive
tools.description: Search across the user's drive by name and content. Returns matching items.

q.description: Search query (substring of name or file content).

tools.name: create_share_link
tools.description: Create a sharing link for an item — view, edit, or embed. Optionally restrict scope to organization users.
